title: Opening for Category Manager at Firstcry Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Firstcry Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Firstcry Digital Technologies, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Firstcry Digital Technologies:
Firstcry Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Product Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry Digital Technologies!
